since_last: 45% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.68%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 45% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.03% · BTC +2.69% · Gold -0.16% · Nasdaq100 +0.10%. 45% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.68%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.68%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.54%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +11.17%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +11.17%, DELL +4.51%, MU +4.11%, NXPI +3.97%, ZBRA +3.86%. Laggards: SPCX -9.99%, AVAV -9.80%, MDB -6.58%, OKLO -5.44%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -9.99% at $166.52
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -9.99% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
